session.objective: Fix issue #1711: PR description validator must handle backtick-wrapped list-item file paths used by the autonomous PR template. Make the list-item regex explicitly accept optional surrounding backticks and add regression test coverage.

workLog.action: Read candidate issues JSON; selected P1 issue #1711 (matches branch prefix feat/1711-autonomous, no existing PR)
workLog.result: Selected: 'fix(ci): PR description validator rejects backtick-wrapped file paths'

workLog.action: Verified no existing PR links to issue 1711 via get_pull_requests.py skill script
Ran scripts/validation/pr_description.py --ci against the 10 referenced failing PRs (#1681, #1684-#1687, #1695-#1699) to reproduce the reported behavior
workLog.result: All 10 PRs pass the current validator cleanly; normalize_path already strips backticks captured by the greedy \S+ list-item regex. Fix is still valuable: make the regex explicit about backticks so the captured group doesn't rely on downstream stripping, and so future edge cases (e.g. paths containing multiple dots near a trailing backtick) remain robust

workLog.action: Updated FILE_MENTION_PATTERNS list-item regex from '\S+\.ext' (greedy, relies on normalize_path to strip backticks) to '`?[^\s`]+\.ext`?' (explicit optional backticks, non-backtick non-whitespace body). Added in-source comment documenting the autonomous PR template use case

Added regression test TestExtractMentionedFiles::test_list_items_with_backtick_wrapped_paths covering the autonomous PR template form '- `path/file.ext`: description', asserting extraction and that no backticks leak into the result
workLog.result: tests/test_validation_pr_description.py updated; 87 pytest collected, all pass, 0 warnings

workLog.action: Re-ran validator against representative failing PRs after the regex change to confirm no regression
workLog.result: PR #1684, #1695, #1699 -> 'PR description matches diff (no mismatches found)'

deliverables.description: List-item file-mention regex accepts optional surrounding backticks so autonomous PR template paths (`- \`foo.py\`: desc`) are extracted cleanly without relying on post-capture stripping
Regression test for backtick-wrapped list-item file paths (issue #1711)
